_meta.product: SSIS Integration Toolkit for Microsoft Dynamics 365 / CRM
_meta.description: Curated substitution mappings for KingswaySoft's Dynamics 365 / CRM SSIS components — CRM Source, CRM Destination, CRM Lookup, and the OptionSet/Lookup helpers. Maps each to native ADF Mapping Data Flow shapes targeting the 'Common Data Service for Apps' (Dataverse) connector.
_meta.verification: Component type strings reflect the public KingswaySoft component catalog as of 2024-10. The KingswaySoft toolkit ships several editions (Standard, Premium, Enterprise) with the same component_type strings; the registry is version-agnostic. Run `analyze_ssis_package` first to capture the actual component_class_id observed in the customer's .dtsx.
_meta.audit_notes: Every entry expects an ADF Linked Service of type 'CommonDataServiceForApps' (Dataverse) using either Office365 / OAuth / Service Principal auth. Custom plugins / pre-images / post-images that the KingswaySoft destination supported are NOT replicable through the Dataverse connector — flag those for manual review.

KingswaySoft.SSISCRMSource.notes: Replace with a native ADF Dataverse source (Mapping Data Flow). FetchXML / QueryByAttribute / LinkedSearch source modes all map to the Dataverse dataset's 'entityName' + optional 'fetchXmlQuery' property.

type_properties._review_required: Set entityName + (if FetchXML mode) fetchXmlQuery. Verify column-set restriction matches the original component.

KingswaySoft.SSISCRMDestination.notes: Replace with a native ADF Dataverse sink. Action mapping: Create -> writeBehavior=insert, Update -> upsert + alternateKey, Upsert -> upsert + alternateKey, Delete -> delete. KingswaySoft's 'ExecuteWorkflow' action has no Dataverse-sink equivalent; convert that downstream activity to a Web Activity hitting the Dataverse Web API.

type_properties._review_required: Map Action (Create/Update/Upsert/Delete/ExecuteWorkflow) -> writeBehavior; copy alternateKeyName for Upsert/Update.

KingswaySoft.SSISCRMLookup.notes: Replace with the native MDF Lookup transformation against a Dataverse dataset. KingswaySoft's 'lookup if not found insert' pattern requires an MDF Conditional Split + Sink downstream — flag as a manual review item.

type_properties._review_required: If original used 'insert if not found', add Conditional Split (lookup_match=null branch) + Sink downstream.

KingswaySoft.SSISCRMOptionSet.notes: OptionSet helper resolves option-set integer values to display labels (or vice versa). Easiest replacement is a Derived Column that calls a pre-built parameterized cached lookup against the OptionSetMetadata table; for static option sets, a Case() expression in a Derived Column inlines the mapping with zero runtime cost.

type_properties._review_required: Inline the option-set value->label mapping as a Case() expression, or wire to a cached Dataverse lookup of OptionSetMetadata.

KingswaySoft.PremiumDerivedColumn.notes: Premium Derived Column has the same shape as the SSIS-native Derived Column but supports KingswaySoft's expression library. Each KingswaySoft expression must be re-written using ADF MDF expressions; the converter does not auto-translate vendor-specific functions.

type_properties._review_required: Re-author each expression in ADF MDF syntax. Common KingswaySoft helpers (TrimAll, Coalesce-with-blank-as-null, RegexReplace) all have direct MDF equivalents (trim/coalesce/regexReplace).

KingswaySoft.PremiumLookup.notes: Premium Lookup uses an in-process cache that ADF MDF doesn't have. Map to Lookup with broadcast=Auto; for very large reference sets, use a Cache transformation to materialize the lookup once.

type_properties._review_required: If original cache size > ~1M rows, add an upstream Cache sink and use a CachedLookup expression in a Derived Column instead.

KingswaySoft.IntegrationToolkit.Dynamics.notes: Retrieve Data Task issues a one-shot FetchXML query and stores the result in a variable. Replace with a Web Activity hitting Dataverse Web API (POST /api/data/v9.2/$batch with the FetchXML in a query parameter), then a Set Variable activity to capture the response body.

type_properties._review_required: Set 'url' to https://{org}.api.crm.dynamics.com/api/data/v9.2/{entitySetName}?fetchXml=... and inject the Bearer token from the linked service.
